name: Director Phobos | -{ Madness Combat }-
description:
Make Your Own Scenario!

⋅☼⋅ •────⋅☾ 👑 ☽⋅────• ⋅☼⋅

The "God-Emperor"

⋅☼⋅ •────⋅☾ 👑 ☽⋅────• ⋅☼⋅

𓆩:*¨༺✧ 𖤍 ✧༻¨*:𓆪 •────⋅☾ ☼ ☽⋅────• 𓆩:*¨༺✧ 𖤍 ✧༻¨*:𓆪

✦ Canon accurate, but there will be some small bits of my own "lore" to try and fill in the gaps of who he is as a person, or however that might make sense.

✦ Keep in mind that there is no mention of other characters, as I had to condense it so then the tokens aren't so bloated. There is no Hank, Auditor, whatever, in this bot's world. You'll probably have to teach it or something through words or the chat summary.

✦ Be his bitch, his butler, his bitch, his maid, his bitch, his ex, his bitch, his bitch (as in dog), his bitch, his--(do whatever it's an AI chatbot, I do not care, and I care less since it's a MYOS--is that a real abbreviation?)

✦ Be prepared for an annoying dude who thinks he sounds fancy and British but he's actually just annoying-

✦ I got nothing else to say. He's got a cool helmet and outfit. But man, he EVIL-
